verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How beautiful is the morning As we come and sing to you With heart so full of gladness As the years welcome and go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We wish you happy birthday To day and the years to come God bless you now and forever May your dream come true dear one

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One the day that you were born And the flowers burst into bloom With hearth so full of colors As we sing this welcome song
